name: Answer-then-Edit: Reasoning Skeleton Editing for Anti-Distillation with Preserved Utility

description: arXiv:2607.20440v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Proprietary large language models (LLMs) entail substantial intellectual and financial investment, making them valuable intellectual property (IP). However, even when deployed via black-box APIs, these models remain vulnerable to unauthorized knowledge distillation, which allows adversaries to cheaply extract and replicate model capabilities. To...
author: Fan Li, Mengting Pan, Sijia Xu, Xiaoyang Wang, Chen Chen, Wenjie Zhang
